case_title: JOSEPHINE FLOYD VS. JOSE PAZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SC-105 ANSWER TO SC-105 REQUEST FILED JAN-03-22 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FLOYD, JOSEPHINE ON BEHALF OF HOA
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER **DENIED** -THE CASE WAS HEARD IN COURT ON 1/13/22 AND DISMISSED WITHOUT PREDJUDICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) SERVED NOV-23-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BISCARO, BARBARA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BISCARO, BARBARA
DECLARATION OF EXHIBITS A AND B EXHIBITS TO BE FILED IN COURT. FILED BY DEFENDANT BISCARO, BARBARA
SC-105 - ANSWER TO SC-105 ANSWER TO SC-105 REQUEST FILED JAN-03-22 FILED BY DEFENDANT PAZ, JOSE
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: RESPONDENT CAME TO SHERIFF'S OFFICE AT CITY HALL, ROOM 456 AND WAS SERVED THE DOCUMENTS. SERVED NOV-29-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PAZ, JOSE
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT BISCARO, BARBARA

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF JOSEPHINE FLOYD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSE PAZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BARBARA BISCARO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT DETERMINES THAT THIS MATTER IS "NOT RIPE" AND CANNOT GO FORWARD AT THIS TIME. NO OUT-OF-POCKET COSTS OR DAMAGES HAVE OCCURRED ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. COURT ALSO DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFF DOES NOT HAVE THE AUTHORITY TO BRING ON A CASE ON BEHALF OF THE HOA. DEFENDANTS EXERCISE THEIR RIGHT TO HAVE THIS MATTER GO THROUGH ARBITRATION AS REQUIRED BY THE HOA CONTRACT. COURT DISMISSES THIS MATTER WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS (BISCARO'S) ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,801.66 FILED BY FLOYD, JOSEPHINE ON BEHALF OF HOA AS TO DEFENDANT PAZ, JOSE BISCARO, BARBARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-13-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
(SC-109)REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT BISCARO, BARBARA
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
